name: Al Juffair
tagline: Cosmopolitan high-rise living in the heart of Manama
description: Al Juffair is Bahrain's most sought-after expat neighborhood — a dense district of modern towers, boutique restaurants, embassies, and walkable streets.

name: Amwaj Islands
tagline: Exclusive island living with beachfront access
description: Amwaj Islands is a man-made archipelago offering freehold properties, private beaches, marinas, and a resort-style lifestyle.

name: Seef
tagline: Bahrain's premier business and retail district
description: Seef is Bahrain's central business and shopping hub, home to Seef Mall, City Centre Bahrain, and a dense cluster of corporate towers and hotels.

name: Bahrain Financial Harbour
tagline: Iconic twin towers on Manama's seafront
description: Bahrain Financial Harbour is Bahrain's signature mixed-use financial district, featuring the landmark twin tower complex overlooking the Arabian Gulf.

name: Reef Island
tagline: Upscale seafront living near the capital
description: Reef Island offers premium waterfront apartments with direct sea views, luxury amenities, and easy access to Manama's business districts.

name: Dilmunia Island
tagline: Health-centric island community in North Bahrain
description: Dilmunia Island is a wellness-focused development in Muharraq, featuring modern apartments, parks, and direct sea access.

name: Diyar Al Muharraq
tagline: Modern waterfront city north of Bahrain
description: Diyar Al Muharraq is a large-scale master-planned community on reclaimed land, offering freehold properties, beaches, and resort amenities.

name: Manama
tagline: The historic capital at the heart of Bahrain
description: Manama is Bahrain's cosmopolitan capital, blending modern towers, the historic souq, cultural landmarks, and the diplomatic quarter.

name: Bahrain Bay
tagline: Landmark mixed-use development on reclaimed land
description: Bahrain Bay is an iconic waterfront district next to the Four Seasons Hotel, featuring premium residences, luxury hotels, and stunning sea views.

name: Saar
tagline: Quiet suburban living in the Northern Governorate
description: Saar is a popular residential suburb offering spacious villas, family-friendly parks, and a calm lifestyle away from the city centre.

name: Janabiya
tagline: Upscale suburban villas in the Northern Governorate
description: Janabiya is an affluent suburb popular with diplomats and expatriate families, offering large villas, private gardens, and a peaceful environment.

name: Hamala
tagline: Lush green suburb with spacious family homes
description: Hamala is a leafy residential area in the Northern Governorate, known for its green surroundings, large plot sizes, and relaxed suburban atmosphere.

name: Zallaq
tagline: Beachfront resort living in Southern Bahrain
description: Zallaq is a resort destination on Bahrain's southern coast, featuring luxury hotels, private beaches, and the iconic Bahrain International Circuit nearby.

name: Courtyard W.L.L, Seef
description: Explore properties available in Courtyard W.L.L, Seef, Bahrain.

name: Hidd
tagline: Industrial port area with growing residential appeal
description: Hidd is in Muharraq Governorate near the port and industrial zones, offering affordable apartments with easy access to the airport and Muharraq.

name: Sanabis
tagline: Convenient central location close to everything
description: Sanabis is a centrally located residential area between Seef and Manama, offering affordable apartments with easy access to major highways.
